title: BeliefCard
description: A research thesis about one object (an equity, a marketplace listing, a market contract). Research-only: a BeliefCard records what we believe and how confident we are; it does NOT recommend, authorize, or trigger any financial action. decision_label values are research/triage states only. See docs/label_policy.md, docs/verification_policy.md, docs/safety_policy.md.

schema_version.description: Version of this schema the record conforms to.

object_id.description: Stable id of the object this belief is about.

object_type.description: Kind of object under study (Project_money is multi-asset: equities, ETFs, options, macro signals, factors).

thesis_summary.description: Plain-language research thesis. Observational, not directive.

evidence_against.description: Evidence weakening or contradicting the thesis.

uncertainty_flags.description: Known sources of uncertainty / risk in this thesis.

confidence_score.description: Calibrated confidence in the thesis (0-1). Not a position size and not an action signal.

validation_status.description: Verification state per docs/verification_policy.md. Moves upward only after an independent (maker != checker) check.

decision_label.description: Research/triage state of this object. These are the ONLY approved labels. They are observational, not directives: none of them authorize buy, sell, trade, order, entry, or exit. 'paper_candidate' means eligible for paper/research study only, never live execution.

human_review_required.description: Whether a human must review before this belief is relied upon.

invalidation_conditions.description: Concrete conditions that would invalidate the thesis (used by postmortems and re-validation).

related_evidence_ids.description: EvidenceRecord ids relevant to this belief.

related_object_ids.description: Other object ids related to this one.
